title: AYCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Deputy Engineer, Manager/ Deputy Manager and More Posts
post_name: Deputy Engineer (QC & Testing) / Manager/Dy. Manager (Production) / Dy. Company Secretary/Asst. Company Secretary
short_info: Andrew Yule & Company Limited (AYCL) Deputy Engineer (QC & Testing) / Manager/Dy. Manager (Production) / Dy. Company Secretary/Asst. Company Secretary Notification 2026 has been released on 23 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AYCL Deputy Engineer (QC & Testing) / Manager/Dy. Manager (Production) / Dy. Company Secretary/Asst. Company Secretary Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per Government norms for said category of candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Mechanical Or B.E / B. Tech, MBA
qualification.details: Deputy Engineer (QC & Testing): Diploma in Mechanical / Electrical Engineering/ Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering / Electronics & Communication Engineering / Instrumentation Engineering / Production Engineer from a reputed Institution. Manager/Dy. Manager (Production): B.E / B. Tech in Electrical / Electrical & Electronics Engineering/ Mechanical / Production / Manufacturing / Industrial Engineering from a recognized University. Candidate having MBA Qualification will be given preference. Dy. Company Secretary/Asst. Company Secretary: Associate/Fellow Member of Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AYCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AYCL recruitment is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by Andrew Yule & Company Limited for the posts of Deputy Engineer (QC & Testing), Manager/Dy. Manager (Production), and Dy. Company Secretary/Asst. Company Secretary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for AYCL posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, including Diploma in Engineering, B.E/B.Tech, and Associate/Fellow Membership of ICSI. Please refer to the detailed notification for specific post requirements.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to AYCL jobs in 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 42 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the AYCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The salary for the advertised posts ranges from ₹28,000 to ₹2,00,000 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AYCL recruitment will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted for the interview based on their eligibility and qualifications.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for AYCL Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job for AYCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in Kolkata, West Bengal. The company is Andrew Yule & Company Limited, with its address mentioned as Kolkata - 700001.
